projects.name: specorator
projects.description: The main entry point for the ecosystem. An Obsidian plugin that bundles the 12-stage workflow, Claude Code agents, and (in v2.0) the full runtime into a ready-to-use interface. A core requirement: agents work natively inside the vault — reading Canvas, writing Bases properties, enriching Frontmatter — so the vault grows smarter with every project. No coding required.

projects.name: specorator-runtime
projects.description: The npm orchestration library for technical builders. Once live, it exposes the full agent lifecycle — session management, event streaming, stage gating — as a standalone API, so developers can integrate the specorator runtime into their own applications without the Obsidian plugin.

projects.name: agentonomous
projects.description: TypeScript agent library for technical builders. Provides six specialized roles — PM, Architect, Engineering, QA, Review, and Writer — as composable building blocks, so developers can wire up the same agent intelligence that powers specorator into their own tooling.

projects.name: agentic-workflow
projects.description: The 12-stage Agentic Development Lifecycle methodology for technical builders who want the process without the plugin — pure CLI and Markdown, no Obsidian required. Also the engine that powers specorator's structured workflow under the hood.
